summary: Backend-only validation completed via static review and repository checks for real HTTP activation changes. Execution of C++ unit tests was blocked because CMake is not installed in this container. Python backend pytest cases were skipped due to missing NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL/REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Success rates split into Python backend and C++ plugin tracks; skipped tests are scored 0.0.

minor.issue: TestLicensing.cpp only validates missing config path for HttpActivationClient; no unit coverage for env config loading, header override, activate/refresh/deactivate endpoint payloads, or certificate response-shape normalization paths.
cmake is missing in this environment, so Catch2 build/run and runtime verification were not executed.
All pytest cases skipped due to missing NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL/REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Skipped tests are not counted as passed.

action_items: Add unit tests for: configFromEnvironment/createFromEnvironment, configurable header default+override, request body fields for activate/refresh/deactivate, and both certificate response shapes (including raw JSON certificate_payload normalization).
Run full CMake + Catch2 test suite in an environment with cmake/JUCE toolchain.
Provide runtime API env values and rerun Python backend pytest; do not count skipped tests as passed.
critical_code_review_comments: PluginProcessor.cpp (2259 lines) and PluginProcessor.h (697 lines) are at/over maintainability thresholds; continue splitting licensing orchestration and non-audio concerns into focused modules.
LicenseVerifier still supports development signature trust path; ensure production cryptographic verifier is enforced for release builds.

success_rate.methodology: Weighted sum per track: 35% static code review, 15% local syntax/compile checks, 25% unit tests, 25% integration tests. Skipped tests score 0.0. Scores are split into Python backend and C++/JUCE plugin tracks.

python_backend.notes: Static review and Python lint/compile checks completed. All pytest cases skipped (0/2 executed); no runtime API validation.

cpp_plugin.notes: Static review only. CMake missing; no compile or runtime verification performed.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified requested feature mapping in code: env vars, endpoints, request fields, configurable client header, required cert for activate/refresh, optional cert for deactivate, LicenseManager constructor using createFromEnvironment, refresh/deactivate methods present, docs updated. Found test coverage gaps. Also corrected prior iteration claim: loadCachedCertificate is called in PluginProcessor::loadCachedLicenseIfNeeded. Skipped pytest cases must not be counted as passed.
rca of the issue: RCA: Coverage gap. HttpActivationClient paths for env config, header override, and certificate response normalization lack unit tests. Mitigation: add targeted TestLicensing cases and run the suite in a cmake-capable environment.
